commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds iMessage typing keepalive settings, wires tool-start progress to the typing callback, and adds a monitor regression test for tool activity before assistant text.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +94. Total +104 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has no iMessage `onToolStart` handoff, and the proposed handoff is still blocked by the dispatch progress gate unless the quiet channel-owned progress flag is set. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the missing dispatch flag and strengthen the regression test without requiring product judgment.

target.title: Keep iMessage typing active during tool work
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep iMessage native typing indicators alive during long tool-running gaps by using the existing typing RPC keepalive path with a bounded 10 minute TTL.
- Bridge iMessage tool-start progress events to the typing callback so tool activity before any assistant text still shows ephemeral typing instead of sending persistent progress bubbles.
- Add a monitor regression test covering tool activity before reply text and cleanup back to `typing: false`.

Fixes #75847

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/imessage/src/monitor.last-route.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.last-route.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/imessage/src/monitor/monitor-provider.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.last-route.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: iMessage turns with tool activity before reply text now keep the sender's native typing indicator active instead of sending no progress signal.

Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout with mocked iMessage RPC client in the iMessage monitor test harness.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/imessage/src/monitor.last-route.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: the new regression test simulates an inbound iMessage, fires `onToolStart` before any reply text, and observes the `typing` RPC call with `typing: true`.

Observed result after fix: the same test also observes cleanup with `typing: false` after the dispatch settles.

What was not tested: a live macOS Messages/private-API run with a real long-running agent tool call.
target.author: omarshahine

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
